query:
SELECT rp.planId, rp.teamId, rp.createdAt, rp.firstReleasedAt, rp.lastReleasedAt, rp.archivedAt,
       COUNT(rpd.dogId) AS totalDogs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN dr.status = 'released' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS releasedDogs
FROM release_plans rp
LEFT JOIN release_plan_dogs rpd ON rp.planId = rpd.planId
LEFT JOIN dog_records dr ON rpd.dogId = dr.dogId
GROUP BY rp.planId;
